intended_use: The MAGNETOM system is indicated for use as a magnetic resonance diagnostic device (MRDD) that produces transverse, sagittal, coronal and oblique cross sectional images, and that displays the internal
intended_use_full: The MAGNETOM system is indicated for use as a magnetic resonance diagnostic device (MRDD) that produces transverse, sagittal, coronal and oblique cross sectional images, and that displays the internal structure and/or function of the head or extremities. Other physical parameters derived from the images may also be produced. Additionally, the MAGNETOM system is intended to produce Sodium images for the head and Phosphorus spectroscopic images and/or spectra for whole body, excluding the head. These images and/or spectra and the physical parameters derived from the images and/or spectra when interpreted by a trained physician yield information that may assist in diagnosis.
ground_truth: For Deep Resolve Boost: acquired datasets representing ground truth, with input data retrospectively created through under-sampling of k-space, noise addition, and data augmentation. For Deep Resolve Sharp: acquired datasets as ground truth, with low-resolution input created by k-space cropping. For Deep RxE: three different bias field correction methods applied (homodyne filtering, N4, UNICORN); test data set used during training to validate network performance.
other_metrics: Deep Resolve Boost: PSNR and SSIM quality metrics; NRMSE 11% for 2D network and 8.7% for 3D network. Deep Resolve Sharp: PSNR, SSIM, perceptual loss; visual rating and intensity profile comparisons showed increased edge sharpness. Deep RxE: Standard deviation and RMS error calculated against ground truth; demonstrated reproducible increase in image homogeneity.
